set_brightness.intent: set screen brightness to a percentage

set_brightness_mode.intent: enable or disable automatic adaptive brightness
set_brightness_mode.encoding: VALUE: 0 = manual brightness (user-controlled), 1 = automatic/adaptive brightness. Default is 0 (manual).

set_screen_timeout.intent: set how long the screen stays on before turning off
set_screen_timeout.encoding: VALUE is in milliseconds. Multiply seconds by 1000, or minutes by 60000. Common values: 15s→15000, 30s→30000, 1min→60000, 2min→120000, 5min→300000, 10min→600000, 30min→1800000, never→2147483647. Default is 30000 (30 seconds).

set_auto_rotate.intent: enable or disable automatic screen rotation
set_auto_rotate.encoding: VALUE: 1 = auto-rotate enabled (screen rotates with device orientation), 0 = rotation locked (portrait). Default is 1 (auto-rotate on).

set_haptic_feedback.intent: enable or disable haptic feedback / vibration for taps and UI interactions
set_haptic_feedback.encoding: VALUE: 1 = haptic feedback enabled, 0 = disabled. Controls vibration on keyboard taps, button presses, etc. Default is 1 (enabled).

set_vibrate_when_ringing.intent: enable or disable vibration when receiving calls
set_vibrate_when_ringing.encoding: VALUE: 1 = phone vibrates while ringing for calls, 0 = no vibration during ring. Default is 1 (vibrate on).

set_font_scale.intent: set the system font size scale
set_font_scale.encoding: VALUE is a string float. Standard Android scale steps: '0.85' = small, '1.0' = default/normal, '1.15' = large, '1.30' = larger, '1.45' = largest (accessibility). Some devices extend to '2.0'. Always store as a quoted decimal string with no trailing zeros beyond one decimal place. Default is '1.0'.

set_sound_effects.intent: enable or disable UI sound effects (touch sounds, lock sounds, keyboard clicks)
set_sound_effects.encoding: VALUE: 1 = sound effects on (touches, lock/unlock, etc.), 0 = silent UI sounds. Default is 1 (enabled).

set_ringer_mode.intent: set the ringer mode (normal, vibrate, or silent)
set_ringer_mode.encoding: VALUE: 0 = silent (no sound, no vibration), 1 = vibrate only (no ringtone), 2 = normal/ring (audible ringtone). Default is 2 (normal). Note: setting zen_mode may override or interact with ringer_mode.

set_notification_light.intent: enable or disable the notification LED / blinking light pulse
set_notification_light.encoding: VALUE: 1 = notification LED blinks for missed notifications, 0 = LED disabled. Default is 1 (enabled). Only relevant on devices with a physical notification LED.

set_location_mode.intent: set location accuracy mode or disable location entirely
set_location_mode.encoding: VALUE (Android location mode enum): 0 = off (location disabled), 1 = sensors only / device only (GPS only, no network), 2 = battery saving (network/Wi-Fi only, no GPS), 3 = high accuracy (GPS + Wi-Fi + mobile network). Default is 1 (sensors/device only). Modern Android (API 28+) collapses to on/off but the key still accepts these codes.

set_adb.encoding: VALUE: 1 = ADB/USB debugging enabled, 0 = disabled. Default is 0 (disabled). Requires development_settings_enabled=1 in global namespace to take effect.

set_install_unknown_apps.intent: enable or disable installation of apps from unknown sources (outside Play Store)
set_install_unknown_apps.encoding: VALUE: 1 = allow sideloading / unknown sources, 0 = only Play Store installs allowed. Default is 0 (disabled). On Android 8+, per-app permission supersedes this global, but the key is still respected on many devices.

set_accessibility.intent: enable or disable the master accessibility services switch
set_accessibility.encoding: VALUE: 1 = accessibility services are active, 0 = disabled. Default is 0. Individual services also need to be listed in enabled_accessibility_services; this key is the master gate.

set_screensaver.intent: enable or disable the screensaver / daydream when charging or docked
set_screensaver.encoding: VALUE: 1 = screensaver/daydream enabled (activates when charging/docked), 0 = disabled. Default is 1 (enabled).

set_always_on_display.intent: enable or disable always-on display (AOD) / ambient display
set_always_on_display.encoding: VALUE: 1 = always-on display active (shows clock/notifications when screen off), 0 = disabled. Default is 0. Enabling consumes more battery.

set_input_method.intent: set the default keyboard / input method
set_input_method.encoding: VALUE is a string: the component name of the IME (Input Method Editor). Examples: 'gboard' or 'com.google.android.inputmethod.latin/.LatinIME' for Gboard, 'com.swiftkey.SwiftKey/.keyboard.KeyboardService' for SwiftKey. Use the exact package/component string. Default is 'gboard'.

set_high_text_contrast.intent: enable or disable high text contrast for improved readability
set_high_text_contrast.encoding: VALUE: 1 = high contrast text enabled (bolder, higher-contrast font rendering), 0 = normal text rendering. Default is 0 (disabled). Accessibility feature.

set_airplane_mode.intent: enable or disable airplane mode (disables all radios)
set_airplane_mode.encoding: VALUE: 1 = airplane mode on (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, mobile data, NFC all disabled), 0 = airplane mode off. Default is 0. Note: the setting alone may not toggle hardware radios on all devices — a broadcast intent is also typically needed, but this key records the state.

set_wifi.encoding: VALUE: 1 = Wi-Fi enabled, 0 = Wi-Fi disabled. Default is 1 (on).

set_bluetooth.encoding: VALUE: 1 = Bluetooth enabled, 0 = Bluetooth disabled. Default is 1 (on).

set_mobile_data.intent: enable or disable mobile / cellular data
set_mobile_data.encoding: VALUE: 1 = mobile data enabled, 0 = mobile data disabled. Default is 1 (on).

set_data_roaming.intent: enable or disable data roaming on cellular networks
set_data_roaming.encoding: VALUE: 1 = data roaming enabled (use data on foreign/partner networks), 0 = roaming disabled. Default is 0 (disabled, avoids unexpected charges).

set_nfc.intent: enable or disable NFC (Near Field Communication)
set_nfc.encoding: VALUE: 1 = NFC enabled (contactless payments, beam, tags), 0 = NFC disabled. Default is 1 (on).

set_auto_time.intent: enable or disable automatic date and time synchronization
set_auto_time.encoding: VALUE: 1 = automatically set date/time from network (NTP), 0 = manual date/time. Default is 1 (auto on).

set_auto_timezone.intent: enable or disable automatic time zone detection
set_auto_timezone.encoding: VALUE: 1 = automatically set time zone from network/location, 0 = manual time zone. Default is 1 (auto on).

set_device_name.intent: set the device name / hostname visible to other devices
set_device_name.encoding: VALUE is a plain string, e.g. 'Pixel-8', 'MyPhone', 'John-Pixel'. Shown in Bluetooth device lists, Wi-Fi hotspot, and nearby-share. No quotes needed in the command. Default is 'Pixel-8'.

set_zen_mode.intent: set Do Not Disturb (DND) / zen mode level
set_zen_mode.encoding: VALUE (Android zen_mode enum): 0 = off (all notifications allowed), 1 = important interruptions only (priority contacts/alarms break through), 2 = total silence (nothing gets through, including alarms), 3 = alarms only (only alarm clock sounds). Default is 0 (off). Note: code 1 is sometimes labeled 'priority only'; code 2 is full DND silence.

set_battery_saver.intent: enable or disable battery saver / low power mode
set_battery_saver.encoding: VALUE: 1 = battery saver on (restricts background activity, reduces performance, dims screen), 0 = normal mode. Default is 0 (off). Typically auto-activates below 15–20% if configured.

set_heads_up_notifications.intent: enable or disable heads-up / peek notifications (pop-over banners while using phone)
set_heads_up_notifications.encoding: VALUE: 1 = heads-up notifications enabled (banners float over current app), 0 = disabled (notifications only appear in status bar/shade). Default is 1 (enabled).

set_developer_options.intent: enable or disable the developer options menu
set_developer_options.encoding: VALUE: 1 = developer options visible and active in Settings, 0 = developer options hidden. Default is 0 (hidden). Required before adb_enabled takes effect.

set_wifi_sleep_policy.intent: set when Wi-Fi is allowed to sleep (turn off) to save battery
set_wifi_sleep_policy.encoding: VALUE (Android wifi_sleep_policy enum): 0 = never sleep (Wi-Fi stays on always), 1 = sleep only when plugged in (stays on on battery, sleeps when charging and screen off), 2 = always sleep when screen is off (default power-saving behavior). Default is 2.

bedtime_routine.intent: prepare the phone for sleep: silence, dim, long timeout, DND alarms-only
bedtime_routine.note: zen_mode=3 (alarms only), ringer_mode=0 (silent), brightness=10% (~26), screen_off_timeout=120000 (2 min), heads_up=0, doze_always_on=0 (save battery overnight), haptic=0, vibrate_when_ringing=0

battery_saver_routine.note: low_power=1, brightness=20% (~51), brightness_mode=0 (manual to avoid sensor drain), screen_off_timeout=15000 (15s), bluetooth=0, nfc=0, doze_always_on=0, wifi_sleep_policy=2, mobile_data=1 (keep for notifications), location_mode=0 (off to save GPS)

driving_routine.intent: optimise phone for safe in-car use: loud ring, auto-rotate off, screen on, DND except calls
driving_routine.note: ringer_mode=2 (normal/loud), vibrate_when_ringing=0, zen_mode=1 (priority — calls break through), brightness=100% (255) or brightness_mode=1 (auto), screen_off_timeout=600000 (10 min), accelerometer_rotation=0 (lock landscape for mount), bluetooth=1 (for car audio), heads_up=0 (reduce distraction)

airplane_flight_routine.intent: enable airplane mode for flights, optionally re-enable Wi-Fi for in-flight entertainment
airplane_flight_routine.note: airplane_mode_on=1, then wifi_on=1 if in-flight Wi-Fi available, bluetooth_on=1 for headphones, screen_off_timeout=300000 (5 min), brightness=50% (128) for cabin comfort

focus_dnd_routine.intent: deep work / focus session: total silence, no banners, minimal distractions
focus_dnd_routine.note: zen_mode=2 (total silence), ringer_mode=0 (silent), heads_up=0, vibrate_when_ringing=0, haptic=0, sound_effects=0, notification_light=0 — zero interruptions

gaming_routine.intent: maximise display and responsiveness for gaming: bright screen, no interruptions, long timeout
gaming_routine.note: brightness=100% (255), brightness_mode=0 (manual, stable), screen_off_timeout=1800000 (30 min), accelerometer_rotation=1 (auto-rotate for landscape games), zen_mode=1 (priority only — no popups), heads_up=0, haptic=1 (game feedback), sound_effects=1

accessibility_routine.intent: enable key accessibility features for users with visual or motor impairments
accessibility_routine.note: font_scale='1.45' (largest standard), high_text_contrast=1, brightness=80% (204), brightness_mode=1 (auto), accessibility_enabled=1, screen_off_timeout=300000 (5 min — more time to read), haptic=1

privacy_lockdown_routine.intent: reduce data exposure: disable radios, location, ADB, unknown sources, roaming
privacy_lockdown_routine.note: location_mode=0 (off), adb=0, install_non_market_apps=0, data_roaming=0, nfc=0, bluetooth=0, development_settings=0, doze_always_on=0 (no ambient sensor exposure)

presentation_mode_routine.intent: give a presentation or demo: bright stable screen, silent, no notifications, no rotation surprises
presentation_mode_routine.note: brightness=100% (255), brightness_mode=0 (manual, no flicker), screen_off_timeout=1800000 (30 min), accelerometer_rotation=0 (lock — avoid accidental rotation), zen_mode=2 (total silence), ringer_mode=0, heads_up=0, sound_effects=0

outdoor_bright_routine.note: brightness=255 (100%), brightness_mode=1 (auto-adaptive for sunlight boost on Pixel), screen_off_timeout=120000 (2 min to balance battery)

developer_debug_routine.intent: enable developer tools and ADB for development/debugging work
developer_debug_routine.note: development_settings_enabled=1 first (required), then adb_enabled=1, screen_off_timeout=600000 (10 min — avoid reconnects), doze_always_on=0 (avoid screen staying on only for AOD)

travel_roaming_routine.intent: prepare phone for international travel: enable roaming, auto time zone, set device name, disable NFC tap-to-pay risk
travel_roaming_routine.note: data_roaming=1, auto_time=1, auto_time_zone=1, nfc=0 (reduce skimming risk in crowded places), wifi_on=1 (use hotel/airport Wi-Fi), device_name as preferred (e.g. 'MyPhone-Travel')
